title: AlternativeOfferEntry
description: One ranked row inside an AlternativeOfferSession. Rank ordinals belong only to ranked offers, never to callback fallback.

alternativeOfferEntryId.description: Stable identifier for the ranked offer row.

candidateRef.description: Candidate reference carried forward from the 312 candidate snapshot.

slotCandidateRef.description: Specific NetworkSlotCandidate or equivalent slot source.

rankOrdinal.description: Visible rank ordinal. Callback fallback may never occupy this field.

availabilityWindowStartAt.description: Visible appointment start time for the offer.

availabilityWindowEndAt.description: Visible appointment end time for the offer.

patientFacingLabel.description: Patient-safe label for the offered appointment.

staffReasonCueRefs.description: Staff-only explanation cues for replay and audit.

selectionState.description: Current row selection posture. Superseded entries remain provenance only.

truthTupleHash.description: Current truth tuple hash at the time of publication.

sourceRefs.description: Algorithm source refs carried into the contract pack.
